ca.detalle: +9 armor, +1 Dex, +3 natural, +2 deflection vs. evil

notasTacticas: El arma sagrada del origen se conserva como ataque con mejora y daño de fuego separados de forma conservadora.

habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Flames of Faith (Ex) A legion archon can manifest a +1 flaming burst greatsword or +1 flaming javelin as a move-equivalent action. The legion archon's sword vanishes if it leaves its hand, and its javelin vanishes after striking or missing its target.  Second Skin (Ex) A legion archon is proficient in all forms of armor. It takes no reduction to its speed or any armor check penalties from wearing any sort of armor. Most legion archons wear full plate armor.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Flames of Faith (Ex) A legion archon can manifest a +1 flaming burst greatsword or +1 flaming javelin as a move-equivalent action. The legion archon's sword vanishes if it leaves its hand, and its javelin vanishes after striking or missing its target.  Second Skin (Ex) A legion archon is proficient in all forms of armor. It takes no reduction to its speed or any armor check penalties from wearing any sort of armor. Most legion archons wear full plate armor.

fullStatBlock:
CR 7
Legion Archon
LG Medium outsider archon, extraplanar, good, lawful
Init +1
Senses darkvision 60 ft., detect evil, low-light vision; Perception +13
AC 23, touch 11, flat-footed 22 (+9 armor, +1 Dex, +3 natural, +2 deflection vs. evil)
hp 76 (8d10+32)
Fort +10, Ref +3, Will +8
Speed 40 ft., fly 90 ft. (average)
Melee +1 flaming burst greatsword +13/+8 (2d6+5/17-20 plus 1d6 fire)
Ranged +1 flaming javelin +10 (1d6+4 plus 1d6 fire)
Special Attacks flames of faith
Special Abilities Flames of Faith (Ex) A legion archon can manifest a +1 flaming burst greatsword or +1 flaming javelin as a move-equivalent action. The legion archon's sword vanishes if it leaves its hand, and its javelin vanishes after striking or missing its target.  Second Skin (Ex) A legion archon is proficient in all forms of armor. It takes no reduction to its speed or any armor check penalties from wearing any sort of armor. Most legion archons wear full plate armor.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 16, Dex 12, Con 19, Int 10, Wis 15, Cha 17
Base Atk +8; CMB +11; CMD 22
Feats Improved Bull Rush, Improved Critical (greatsword)B, Power Attack, Vital Strike, Weapon Focus (greatsword), Whirlwind AttackB
Skills Diplomacy +14, Fly +12, Intimidate +14, Knowledge (religion) +11, Perception +13, Sense Motive +9, Survival +9
Languages Celestial, Draconic, Infernal; truespeech
Environment  any (Heaven)
Organization solitary, pair, or squad (3-12)
Treasure standard (masterwork full plate, other treasure)
DR 10/evil
SR 18
Immune electricity, petrification
Source PFRPG Bestiary 3
